title: Plant String Mod
description: You can now craft a substitute for string from grass and other plants
body: Have you ever needed an easier way to obtain string? Well with this mod you can now craft Plant String from sheared Grass, Tall Grass, Ferns, Large Ferns, and Vines. You can use this string for any Vanilla or Modded Recipe requiring string.                                                                      ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d63d9cd6297964fcc45e50d532b23b9f3a9c7b34.png)          ![Shear Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d38ef9dbca8fe32ef2a820d99dadd459b64b5f9.png)
